name: Soft Peanut Butter Cookies & Peanut Blossoms
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat the sweetened condensed milk and peanut butter until smooth.
3. Add the biscuit mix and vanilla; mix well until combined.
4. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
5. Roll each ball in granulated sugar.
6. Place the cookies about 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Flatten each cookie with a fork.
8. Bake for 6 to 8 minutes, or until lightly browned. Do not overbake.
9. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
10. Store tightly covered at room temperature. Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
Variation: Peanut Blossoms
To make Peanut Blossoms, shape the cookies as above without flattening them. Bake as directed. Immediately after baking, press an unwrapped milk chocolate candy kiss into the center of each cookie to ensure it stays in place. The cookie will spread as you press, leaving cracks and gaps along the outside edge.
